# Tw93 Blog

> Personal blog by Tw93 (Tang), a product engineer from Hangzhou. Posts on product engineering, AI-assisted coding, macOS development, and design.

## Author

Tw93 is a product engineer who builds open source developer tools. 130K+ GitHub stars across projects including Pake, MiaoYan, Kaku, Mole, Waza, and Kami.

## Content

- ~188 blog posts in Chinese and English
- Topics: product engineering, AI coding workflows, Rust/Swift/TypeScript, design thinking
- RSS: https://tw93.fun/feed.xml

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/tw93
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/HiTw93
- Weekly Newsletter: https://weekly.tw93.fun
- AI Profile: https://yobi.tw93.fun/llms-full.txt
